text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day in February, while I'm doing my usual
work...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock! Pardon the intrusion!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: And I'm off again! Apologies for the disturbance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...What was that all about?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Patter, patter, patter!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer?! Why aren't you following me?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Come on, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin, BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow her all the way to the park, completely
clueless as to what is going on. That's when...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Now please accept my gift!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin O hands me a cute little box. I wonder
what's inside?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Happy Valentine's Day, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Why are you so shocked?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Of course I do! It's the day when you give
chocolate to the people you count on!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Every year, my classmates give me all kinds of
candy too, it's so lively!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I received many a sweet this year too! Well, I
guess that's what it means to be popular!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Might?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ahem, well enough about that!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I cannot be the gift giver whilst on school
grounds! For I am the class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That is why I put this excellent mind of mine to
work! If it's out of school bounds, there shouldn't
be an issue!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: So I decided to whip up some chocolates!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Well, of course! When it comes to Valentine's
chocolates, handmade is best, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This is just me using the skills that earned the
words, "I'll give you the credit, so don't do
anything more." from my Home Economics
teacher!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Well, I somehow managed to remove that thing
that was sticking out of it, and then I walloped it
back into shape, so it's ready to eat!
choice_data_list: Can this really be considered chocolate?
Can this really be considered chocolate?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I'm not used to all this Valentine stuff...
but I just had to give you something!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
After all, Trainer, you're the one who stood by my
dream.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Even I realize it, you know. That I've got a pretty
big dream on my hands.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's not like it can't come true, given my
talent and speed.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But the truth is, outside of my family, you're the
only one that understands me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Just kidding! Hehe, but you already knew that,
didn't you, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
With all that said though, please, go ahead and
savor my feelings of gratitude!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I really do appreciate Sakura Bakushin O's
feelings, but being trusted this much is a lot to
take in...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yes, I do!
choice_data_list: Then let's have some chocolate fondue!
Then let's have some chocolate fondue!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Are you sure?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see, this must be what you call a "reverse
Valentine"! Then I would like to tackle it
Bakushin-style!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I end up taking Bakushin O out for some
chocolate fondue. I'm relieved when I see she's
enjoying herself.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Have a bite, say aaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Open wide and chomp down! I want to hear you
say it's delicious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's waiting for me... I can't disappoint her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chomp... snap, crunch.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you're really munching down! How's the
taste?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...It tastes like a tire? Maybe mud, or grass? I
can't tell for sure, but it does have a unique flavor
to it. One that I don't think is chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I thought so!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I knew it would be delicious since I made it, but
truth is I was a little worried.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm not as good at cooking as I am running. But if
you say it's delicious then...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, what a relief!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well... I got to see her smile. That alone makes
this a wonderful Valentine's Day. I'll just think of
it that way.
